results.title: Sen. Collins misleads on election security | Letter
results.description: “I believe only American citizens should vote in American elections,” proclaimed Sen. Susan Collins at the Republican State Convention. That’s like saying I believe people should have car insurance or should pay their taxes. It has been the law of the land for generations that only American citizens can vote in U.S. elections, and Collins [...]

results.title: Thousands to join Prague protest in support of Czech Television and Radio
results.description: Demonstrators in Prague will march against proposed changes to Czech public media funding, with a petition to be delivered to the government.

results.title: "World May Get Some Good News In Next Few Hours": Marco Rubio On US-Iran Deal
results.description: Marco Rubio said the emerging peace deal would address concerns on the Strait of Hormuz.

results.title: Political Marriages Are Never Easy: The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance Will Rise- Dr Mwelwa
results.description: By Dr Mwelwa Alliances are rarely born in comfort. They emerge through sacrifice, compromise, urgency, and pressure, especially when history demands political unity. The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance was formed days before nominations, not after years of planning, consultation, harmonization, and structured political consolidation. To expect immediate perfection in such circumstances is unrealistic because coalition politics everywhere [...] The post Political Marriages Are Never Easy: The Tonse/Pamodzi Alliance Will Rise- Dr Mwelwa first appeared on The Zambian Observer .
results.source: The Zambian Observer - The Zambian Observer - Late

results.title: Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari Warns People Against Stepping Out After 11 AM
results.description: #ପ ୍ରବଳ_ଖରା #୧୧ଟ ାରେ_ପରେ_ଘରୁ_ବାହାରନି ପ୍ରବଳ ଖରାକୁ ନେଇ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ରାଜସ୍ବମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୁରେଶ ପୂଜାରୀଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ ୧୧ଟାରେ ପରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରନି। ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ଯାଏଁ ଶ୍ରମିକମାନେ ବାହାରେ କାମ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ମନା ରହିଛି। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଅତି ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସ୍ଥଳେ ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାହାରକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି ପାଣି, ଓଦା ଗାମୁଛା ଆଦି ନେଇକି ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ। ୨ ତାରିଖ ଯାଏଁ ଏମିତି ଖରା ରହିବ। Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari has advised people not to step out of their homes after 11 AM due to the prevailing severe heatwave conditions. He said labourers have been prohibited from working outdoors between 11 AM and 3 PM as part of precautionary measures. People going out for urgent work during these hours have been advised to carry drinking water and a wet Gamucha (traditional cotton towel) to avoid heat-related illness. According to the minister, the intense heat conditions are likely to continue till the 2nd. The advisory has been issued to ensure public safety amid rising temperatures and harsh summer conditions across the state. #HeatwaveAlert_SureshPujari #OdishaHeatwave #SummerSafety #HeatwaveWarning #ExtremeHeat #WorkerSafety #PublicAdvisory #OdishaNews #HeatwavePrecaution_Odisha #OutdoorWorkBan_Odisha #SureshPujari_HeatAlert #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. OTV being the first private satellite TV channel in Odisha carries the onus of charting a course that behoves its pioneering efforts. Accordingly its charter objectives are FREE, FAIR and UNBIASED. OTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Internet and Mobile. Stay tuned for all the breaking news ! results.title: Lacson to law enforcers: Do a better job in making arrests
results.description: MANILA, Philippines—Sen. Panfilo Lacson on Sunday advised law enforcers to strengthen their intelligence work to locate and arrest high-profile personalities, including Sen. Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa, who is facing an arrest warrant from the International Criminal Court (ICC).
